title: Spear-Phishing Campaign Targeting APAC Financial Institutions
summary: Intelligence suggests a coordinated effort by suspected state-sponsored actors to harvest credentials from key executives within the APAC banking sector. The campaign utilizes highly sophisticated localized lures...

title: Critical RCE Vulnerability Found in Legacy Industrial Control Systems
summary: Security researchers have identified a zero-click Remote Code Execution (RCE) flaw in widely used legacy ICS modules. Facilities using unpatched versions are advised to disconnect affected systems from public networks immediately.

title: DDoS Attacks on Healthcare Infrastructure Increase by 400%
summary: A massive botnet has been actively targeting healthcare providers across North America and Europe. The attack vectors involve high-volume volumetric attacks combined with slowloris tactics to exhaust server resources.

title: Analysis of the 'Void-Walker' Malware Persistence Mechanism
summary: Deep dive into the persistence techniques of the Void-Walker malware. The payload achieves persistence by modifying UEFI firmware, making it exceptionally difficult to detect or remove using standard OS-level security tools.
